comment.body:
""However, momentum and sentiment-wise, as long as SPX can close above 5955, ES=F above 5968.10, NDX above 21,549.18 and NQ=F above 21,603.46, pullback is not confirmed.Today’s last buying opportunity, potential support is at 5955/60 zone, especially into the power hour, overall the trend points down for me as you know.
I code the centroid at 5966.42 - 5946.51 zone (aligning with the last supportive zone), below the downside pivot is 5940.54,""
